center.name: 中央山脈 (呂宋島)
center.summary: 中央山脈 (呂宋島)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cordillera ground warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests
